title: Client & Expert Testimonials | Psychology Direct
description: Read what solicitors, schools, and professionals say about working with Psychology Direct.

blocks.headline: What Clients & Experts Say About Us
blocks.subtitle: Real feedback from solicitors, local authorities, schools, and professionals who work with us. See why people trust us.

children.text: "Staff are helpful and informative and their range of experts is second to none. Reports are delivered securely and on time. They take the hard work out of locating relevant available experts."
— Brent Patterson, Solicitor, Howard Bernstein Solicitors
"I was very grateful for the speed and quality of response in identifying suitable experts who could hit tight timeframes. A very helpful service."
— Tom Battarbee, Solicitor, Swain & Co
"Deadlines needed to be met and it was extremely useful having the services of a local expert. I would definitely use your service in the future and will recommend you."
— Steve Harman, Solicitor, Williamsons Solicitors
"It is invaluable to defence solicitors to be able to work with agencies who appreciate the importance of the time frames we invariably work within."
— Paralegal, Albin and Co. Solicitors

"Psychology Direct have been providing Educational Psychologist services for Norfolk CC since May 2019 and their reports have been invaluable in helping us provide quality EHC Plans. We have found them to be reliable, efficient, flexible, cost effective, proactive and totally empathetic to our needs. I would have no hesitation in recommending their services to other Local Authorities."
— Stephen Higgins, Principal Educational Psychologist, Norfolk County Council
"A comprehensive and proactive service that goes above and beyond to meet the needs of our young people and families."
— Education Professional, Multi-Academy Trust
"The team at Psychology Direct are responsive, organised, and deliver assessments that meet our statutory timelines."
— School SENCo

"I have worked with Psychology Direct as their associate for several years now. I find the staff to be the most helpful and supportive. Whenever I work on a case, Psychology Direct go out of their way to ensure that the administration side of it runs as smoothly as possible. I hugely appreciate this level of support because it makes the process of working on a case stress free for me. Doing Court work through Psychology Direct makes my life as an Independent Expert Witness easier."
— Dr E A, Chartered Counselling Psychologist
"The team at Psychology Direct are very supportive and welcoming. They are organised, responsive to any questions and ensure the process runs as smoothly as possible."
— L B, Educational Psychologist

"I have been working with Psychology Direct since 2016 and have always found them to be efficient and easy to work with. The coordinators plan visits for me on dates I provide and I have never been without work when I want it. All the team are lovely — so friendly and professional and go out of their way to make my life straightforward."
— L A, Educational Psychologist
"I would highly recommend their service to anyone looking to provide the best quality psychology services for their clients. Their commitment to excellence is evident in every interaction."
— Dr A H, Consultant Clinical Psychologist

"I have spent 4+ years with Psychology Direct and I have a lot to be thankful for. It's a company that inspires me. I like the mindset and culture, and being part of a team that gives its best to help young people with their psychological needs."
— Sandhya, Education Coordinator

"Of all the many things I appreciate about working at Psychology Direct, is the culture and family that we've built and are continuously building. It's a culture that embraces flexibility, celebrates diversity, and one that makes it easier to log into work every day. A team like no other and a lot to be thankful for."
— Razia, Education Coordinator

"Having just joined Psychology Direct not that long ago and the way I have been welcomed to the team has shown me what kind of company I am working for. The support I get from everyone is fantastic and makes me want to do my best at work."
— Freda, Education Coordinator

"As an Education Coordinator at Psychology Direct, it is lovely to see how your role makes a difference to the many families and young people that require an assessment. I am part of a great team that works incredibly hard. Psychology Direct are people focused and we are all in this together."
— Laura, Education Coordinator

blocks.heading: Want to Experience Working With Us?
blocks.bodyText: Ready to instruct an expert? Or ready to join our network? The next step is simple.
